metadata.notes:
agent_supports: yes
daemon_capability: full; driver_capability: gap:wait_turn

assessment.body:
## Verdict

agent_supports: yes
daemon_capability: full; driver_capability: gap:wait_turn

## Scenario signal

context-compaction asserts a session runs a turn, is compacted (user `/compact` or auto at threshold), and continues working afterwards: state topology ready → working → ready → working → ready, final ready, ≤0 tool calls. The load-bearing question for the daemon is WHAT vibe writes to messages.jsonl at the compaction boundary — an in-place summary/marker (session continues in one row), a truncate/rewrite of the append-only file (append-tailer would mis-handle → bug), or a rotation to a NEW ~/.vibe/logs/session/<id>/ dir (two rows). The answer is: compaction ROTATES TO A NEW SESSION DIR — the identical code path as vibe's /clear reset — and the append-only messages.jsonl is NEVER truncated.

## agent = yes

Vibe (live CLI v2.19.0, source under .../uv/tools/mistral-vibe/) has an in-REPL `/compact` slash command AND auto-compaction. `vibe/cli/commands.py:92-95` registers `compact` (alias `/compact`, "Compact conversation history by summarizing…", handler `_compact_history`). `vibe/cli/textual_ui/app.py:2736` `_compact_history` drives `agent_loop.compact()`. Auto-compaction fires at `auto_compact_threshold` (200000; agent_loop.py:949, app.py:723). Confirmed feature ships.

## What compaction does on disk (the crux)

`AgentLoop.compact()` (agent_loop.py:1945-2029): (1) `save_interaction` flushes any pending messages to the CURRENT dir's messages.jsonl; (2) runs the summarizer via `_chat` inside `self.messages.silent()` — this summary turn is NEVER persisted to messages.jsonl (silent + discarded by the reset that follows); (3) `self.messages.reset([system, compaction_context_message])` where compaction_context_message is a `role=user, injected=True` envelope wrapping the summary (compaction.py:render_compaction_context); (4) `await self._reset_session()` (agent_loop.py:1848-1857) mints a FRESH `generate_session_id` and calls `session_logger.reset_session(new_id, parent_session_id=old_id)` — `reset_session` (session_logger.py:393-402) recomputes `session_dir = save_folder` = a brand-new `session_<UTC-ts>_<short-id>` dir; (5) `stats.context_tokens = 0`; (6) `save_interaction` persists the single injected compaction-context user line to the NEW dir. `persist_messages` (session_logger.py:240-257) opens `"a"` (append) and never truncates — the OLD dir's messages.jsonl stays append-only-intact. So compaction = a dir rotation identical to `/clear` (agent_loop.py:clear_history → _reset_session), with two differences: `_compact` keeps `keep_parent=True` (meta.json parent_session_id = old session) vs `/clear`'s keep_parent=False, and the new dir's first line is the injected compaction-context user message rather than the user's next real prompt.

## daemon = full

The adapter keys the daemon session_id off the `session_<...>` dir name (sessionIDFromPath, adapter.go:56-65), so a new dir surfaces as a genuinely new session (new_session:true) — the SAME mechanism the sibling session-reset cell already judged daemon=full. Because the file is append-only (never rewritten), the pkg/tailer append-tailer never mis-handles a truncated/rewound offset — the daemon=bug truncation theory is ruled OUT by source. The observable arc:
1. First turn drives the real session_<ts> dir ready→working→ready normally.
2. `/compact` mints a fresh session_<ts2> dir → the FilesUnderRoot watcher mints a new session. Its first persisted line is the injected (role=user, injected=True) compaction-context message, which the vibe parser maps to `user_message` (parser.go:50-55 — injected user IS user activity, opens a turn), so the post-compaction session is BORN working and settles to ready only when the next real turn completes. The prior same-PID session is swept via `PIDManager.cleanupStalePIDHolders` (pid_manager.go:566-576) emitting KindTranscriptRemoved — the generic #169 'old session disappears' path, exactly as session-reset relies on.
3. The post-compaction turn drives the new session working→ready — proving the session continues after compaction.
4. context_tokens is reset to 0 at compaction and recomputed by the next turn (agent_loop.py:2006-2008); the sidecar in the new dir therefore shows a DROPPED context on the post-compaction turn_done (applySidecar, parser.go:112-114) — a correct reflection of the smaller post-compaction context, not a defect.

The visible state values (working through the post-compaction turn, settle to ready, no waiting) are all captured. The only thing NOT observable is the compaction AS A DISTINCT EVENT and as a SINGLE continuous row — but that is intrinsic to what vibe writes (a dir rotation), the same 'across two sessions' framing claudecode's own context-compaction cell accepted at daemon=full, and vibe's session-reset accepted at daemon=full. These are caveats, not a spec-required observable the daemon mis-handles → daemon stays full.

## driver = gap:wait_turn

`/compact` is NOT a driver gap: it is an in-REPL slash command, so a `slash` step, and slash IS elicited (driver-interactive.sh:113 DRIVE_ELICITS="send slash sleep"). The genuine gap is `wait_turn`: the lifecycle recipe (send → wait_turn → /compact → send → wait_turn) needs turn-completion detection, but wait_turn() (driver-interactive.sh:168-170) dispatches to not_implemented (exit 3) and is absent from DRIVE_ELICITS → recipe-lint raises a semantic_gap before recording. Same gap as every vibe lifecycle cell (session-start, session-reset, long-idle, model-context-display). Two scaffold seams block recording of ANY vibe cell and are ported alongside by record: SEAM 1 — launch (line 155) execs "mistral-vibe", not on PATH (only `vibe` is); SEAM 3 — launch_repl (line 158) never stores the transcript path into SES_TRANSCRIPT[$ACTIVE], and after /compact the driver must ALSO re-resolve SES_TRANSCRIPT[$ACTIVE] to the NEW session_<ts2> dir (like session-reset's post-/clear re-point). Tooling work, not an observability limit — the cell keeps its recipe + spec.
caveats: Provisional on live drive: daemon=full is derived from reading vibe's compact()/reset_session source + the adapter + shared PIDManager cleanup, NOT a vibe recording. No local transcript has ever compacted (the sample session hit 136662 context_tokens < the 200000 auto_compact_threshold, and grep for compaction_summary/previous_user_messages across ~/.vibe/logs/session finds nothing). The BORN-working state of the post-compaction session, the transcript_removed timing, and the new-dir appearance ORDERING are emission properties record must settle from a live /compact.

Compaction is INDISTINGUISHABLE from a /clear reset to the daemon: both take the same reset_session dir-rotation path. The only on-disk difference is meta.json's parent_session_id (set by compact's keep_parent=True, null on /clear), and the vibe adapter reads NEITHER — the sidecar decodes only working_directory/active_model/context_tokens (sidecar.go:55-65) and the parser emits no ParentSessionID. So the post-compaction continuation appears as an UNLINKED new session, and there is no compact-boundary marker (the vibe parser has no IsManualCompactBoundary, unlike claudecode). Richer 'label compaction / link parent' work is a separate ticket, not required by this scenario's state-arc spec.

The post-compaction session is born WORKING (its first persisted line is the injected compaction-context user message with no following turn_done), and only settles to ready after the next real turn completes. If no further turn follows a /compact, that session would sit working until the next prompt — the driver's recipe sends a turn-2 prompt immediately, so it settles.

context_tokens resets to 0 at compaction and recomputes on the next turn — the daemon's context bar DROPS on the post-compaction session's first turn_done. Correct behavior; mistral-medium-3.5's context WINDOW is still unresolved (mistral models absent from core/pkg/capacity), so the utilization bar has no denominator.

The daemon emits no per-turn cost for vibe (sidecar retains only last-turn tokens, not backfillable) — the spec asserts tokens_nonzero + model but NOT cost. messages.jsonl carries no per-event timestamp; backfill uses scan time — irrelevant to the state-topology assertions.

sources.note: Lines 92-95: `compact` command (alias /compact, 'Compact conversation history by summarizing…') → handler _compact_history. Confirms /compact is an in-REPL slash command (→ a `slash` driver step, not a gap).

compact() (1945-2029): summarizer runs in messages.silent() and is NEVER persisted; messages.reset([system, injected compaction-context]); _reset_session() (1848-1857) mints a fresh generate_session_id + session_logger.reset_session(keep_parent=True → parent_session_id=old); context_tokens=0 (2008). Auto-compaction at auto_compact_threshold (949).

reset_session (393-402) recomputes session_dir = save_folder; save_folder (61-72) builds a BRAND-NEW session_<UTC-ts>_<short-id> dir. persist_messages (240-257) opens mode 'a' (append) and never truncates — the old dir's messages.jsonl stays append-only-intact, so NO append-tailer mis-handle (rules out daemon=bug).

render_compaction_context (30-55) builds the post-compaction context as a single user string; compact() wraps it role=user, injected=True. The vibe parser maps injected user → user_message (opens a turn), so the new session is born working.

Lines 50-55: injected user IS user activity → user_message (ClearToolNames). Lines 112-114: context tokens land on turn_done from the sidecar → the post-compaction drop is observable. No IsManualCompactBoundary handling anywhere — compaction is not a distinct parsed event.

cleanupStalePIDHolders (566-576) emits KindTranscriptRemoved for the prior same-PID session when the new (post-compaction) session binds the same vibe PID — the generic #169 'old session disappears' mechanism session-reset also relies on.

Line 113 DRIVE_ELICITS="send slash sleep" (slash IS elicited → /compact ok). Lines 168-170 wait_turn()->not_implemented (the real gap). Line 155 launch execs "mistral-vibe" not on PATH; line 158 SEAM 3 transcript-path capture unported (and must re-resolve to the NEW dir after /compact).

preconditions: vibe CLI on PATH (~/.local/bin/vibe, v2.19.0) and authenticated (Mistral API key)
irrlichd is recording (run-cell.sh isolated mode, or --attach against a --record daemon)

driver seams ported by record: SEAM 1 launch binary vibe (not mistral-vibe), SEAM 2 wait_turn poll on messages.jsonl, SEAM 3 transcript-path capture AND re-resolution of SES_TRANSCRIPT[$ACTIVE] to the NEW session_<ts2> dir after /compact
setup: Create a fresh empty cwd under <staging>/cwd/ so the session's working_directory is unique
Vibe mints its own session_<ts>_<hash> id on launch; the daemon session_id is that directory name
/compact mints a SECOND session_<ts2>_<hash2> dir under the same cwd/PID (parent_session_id set but unread) — the driver re-points subsequent turns at it (SEAM 3)

script.text: Reply with exactly the word: ok
Reply with exactly the word: still-here

verify: events.jsonl shows the FIRST session_<ts>_<hash> entering ready, then a working/ready cycle for turn 1
after /compact, events.jsonl contains a DIFFERENT session_<ts2>_<hash2> appearing (new session_id, new_session:true) — the compaction dir rotation
events.jsonl emits transcript_removed for the FIRST session (same-PID cleanup) — the old session disappears
the post-compaction turn's working/ready cycle is on the NEW session dir, proving the session continues after compaction
final session state is ready; no state ever flips to waiting
meta.json sidecar supplies model mistral-medium-3.5 and a non-zero context_tokens on the post-compaction turn_done (dropped vs pre-compaction)
